flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 30 pp at Metro Technology Centers vs the 2003–2007 baseline (36.4% vs 66.8%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Metro Technology Centers fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Metro Technology Centers rose 22% between 2006 and 2009 (960 → 1.2k).
